forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+---
+depends_on:
+- 01KXJWMRY1WHKFH4PNT731KY99
+- 01KXJWNFZ106SY3N2BWZKC0QPS
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: 8f80
+title: file-demo --chat and --script modes
+---
+## What
+Per plan.md Â§7. Extend `Examples/FileDemo/Sources/file-demo/`:
+- `--chat`: a `LanguageModelSession` with the fused tool, availability-gated (skips gracefully without Apple Intelligence). Scripted prompts drive: read a file â†’ edit by anchor â†’ `diagnostics: clean`; a deliberately type-breaking edit â†’ model sees the compiler error in the tool result â†’ prompted to fix it. Reports op-call accuracy, rendered schema size via `tokenCount(for:)`, and retry-cap behavior on a denied path (`../../etc/passwd` â†’ corrective â†’ model corrects)
+- `--script`: reads op lines (JSON payloads) from stdin, executes sequentially in one process, prints typed outputs â€” the human-driven twin of the integration tests
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `swift run file-demo --script` executes a piped readâ†’editâ†’read sequence against a temp dir and prints valid JSON per op
+- [ ] `swift run file-demo --chat` runs the scripted harness end-to-end on a machine with Apple Intelligence (manual, availability-gated) and skips cleanly otherwise
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] `Tests/FileToolIntegrationTests/ScriptModeTests.swift`: spawn `file-demo --script` with a piped op sequence in an isolated dir; assert JSON outputs and file state
+- [ ] Run `swift test --filter ScriptModeTests` â€” expect: green (chat mode is manual-run but scripted; not a CI gate)
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` â€” write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
\ No newline at end of file

Acceptance: swift run file-demo --script executes piped seq vs temp dir + valid JSON per op; --chat runs scripted harness e2e w/ Apple Intelligence (manual) else skips cleanly. Front-load conventions (public/DocC/no-abbrev/named-constants/no-dup-literals/low-complexity). Starting implementâ†’testâ†’commitâ†’review loop.'

--- original
+++ modified
@@ -4,6 +4,10 @@
   id: 01kxq1st61av1byxvdbwbbbcfk
   text: 'Picked up by /finish. Deps done: CLI driver (731ky99), Integration suite B (zkc0qps). Extend Examples/FileDemo/Sources/file-demo/. --chat: LanguageModelSession w/ the fused tool (FileTool.make), AVAILABILITY-GATED (skips gracefully without Apple Intelligence) â€” scripted prompts drive readâ†’edit-by-anchorâ†’diagnostics:clean; deliberately type-breaking editâ†’model sees compiler error in tool resultâ†’prompted to fix; reports op-call accuracy, rendered schema size via tokenCount(for:), retry-cap on denied path (../../etc/passwdâ†’correctiveâ†’model corrects). MANUAL run (not CI gate), but scripted. --script: reads op lines (JSON payloads) from stdin, executes sequentially in one process, prints typed outputs â€” human-driven twin of integration tests. Reuse OperationCLIDriver/fused tool + FileToolCLI wiring â€” no hand-rolled dispatch; keep --chat harness availability-gated so build/tests don''t require Apple Intelligence. ScriptModeTests.swift (FileToolIntegrationTests): spawn file-demo --script w/ piped readâ†’editâ†’read op sequence in isolated dir, assert JSON per op + file state. Acceptance: swift run file-demo --script executes piped seq vs temp dir + valid JSON per op; --chat runs scripted harness e2e w/ Apple Intelligence (manual) else skips cleanly. Front-load conventions (public/DocC/no-abbrev/named-constants/no-dup-literals/low-complexity). Starting implementâ†’testâ†’commitâ†’review loop.'
   timestamp: 2026-07-17T03:26:56.193774+00:00
+- actor: claude-code
+  id: 01kxq2h3g7hs70f78c7a7rqt2h
+  text: 'Research done. Design: --script logic goes in a new importable Sources/FileTool/FileToolScript.swift (FileToolScript.run(lines:context:) -> [String]): builds the fused tool via FileTool.make, parses each non-blank stdin line via GeneratedContent(json:), and dispatches through OperationTool.call(arguments:) â€” the same AnyOperation path the CLI driver and a LanguageModelSession use (convergence). Output is compact single-line JSON (.sortedKeys), so one op = one stdout line. Malformed JSON line -> throws ScriptModeError.malformedPayload. main.swift branches on argv (--script / --chat / default CLI) with named flag constants. --chat lives in a new file-demo target file (ChatValidationHarness), modeled on the upstream NotesTool ChatValidationHarness: availability-gated on SystemLanguageModel.default.availability (skips cleanly + clean exit off-device; FoundationModels is compile-time present on the macOS 27 SDK so build/tests never require Apple Intelligence). ScriptModeTests: in-process test driving FileToolScript.run (read->edit->read) + malformed-line test + acceptance test spawning the built file-demo --script (located via the .xctest products dir) with piped read->edit->read in an isolated temp dir, asserting JSON per op and on-disk file state. Editing a .txt never spawns sourcekit-lsp (non-diagnosable extension -> skipped), so script tests need no LSP. Adding file-demo as a dependency of FileToolIntegrationTests so swift test pre-builds the spawned binary. Starting TDD: tests first.'
+  timestamp: 2026-07-17T03:39:39.399111+00:00
 depends_on:
 - 01KXJWMRY1WHKFH4PNT731KY99
 - 01KXJWNFZ106SY3N2BWZKC0QPS

Output is compact single-line JSON (.sortedKeys), so one op = one stdout line. Malformed JSON line -> throws ScriptModeError.malformedPayload. main.swift branches on argv (--script / --chat / default CLI) with named flag constants. --chat lives in a new file-demo target file (ChatValidationHarness), modeled on the upstream NotesTool ChatValidationHarness: availability-gated on SystemLanguageModel.default.availability (skips cleanly + clean exit off-device; FoundationModels is compile-time present on the macOS 27 SDK so build/tests never require Apple Intelligence). ScriptModeTests: in-process test driving FileToolScript.run (read->edit->read) + malformed-line test + acceptance test spawning the built file-demo --script (located via the .xctest products dir) with piped read->edit->read in an isolated temp dir, asserting JSON per op and on-disk file state.    timestamp: 2026-07-17T03:39:39.399111+00:00
+- actor: claude-code
+  id: 01kxq312scgnd3nr4x6h36ha1c
+  text: 'Implementation landed. --script logic in Sources/FileTool/FileToolScript.swift (FileToolScript.run + ScriptModeError); main.swift branches argv on --script/--chat/default CLI with named flag constants and reads stdin only. --chat harness in Examples/FileDemo/Sources/file-demo/ChatValidationHarness.swift (availability-gated; scaffolds its own throwaway Swift package so it never touches cwd). Package.swift: FileToolIntegrationTests now depends on file-demo so swift test pre-builds the spawned binary; the spawn test resolves the products dir via Bundle(for: BundleToken.self) (Bundle.allBundles does NOT surface the test bundle under Swift Testing â€” that was the initial spawn-test failure). ScriptModeTests: 4/4 green (in-process read->edit->read, blank-line skip, malformed-line throws ScriptModeError, spawned file-demo --script acceptance asserting JSON per op + disk bytes). NOTE: this machine DOES have Apple Intelligence, so `file-demo --chat` ran live end to end: rendered-schema token count 854, op-call accuracy 2/2 (read + edit-by-anchor), retry-cap probe on ../../etc/passwd returned the PathGuard corrective across 3 attempts and the model corrected on the allowed path. FoundationModels.session.respond(to:) returns String on this SDK (not Response<String>) â€” harness interpolates the response directly. Next: full swift test + swift build + swift run file-demo --script verification.'
+  timestamp: 2026-07-17T03:48:22.956795+00:00
 depends_on:
 - 01KXJWMRY1WHKFH4PNT731KY99
 - 01KXJWNFZ106SY3N2BWZKC0QPS

+- actor: claude-code
+  id: 01kxq3gddk6rkkv3stvjdvc3f6
+  text: 'Done and green; left in doing for review. Adversarial double-check returned REVISE with 3 LOW/non-blocking findings; addressed the 2 actionable ones: (1) flag strings --script/--chat now single-sourced as public FileToolCLI.scriptModeFlag/.chatModeFlag (alongside executableName), referenced by both main.swift and ScriptModeTests (removed the test''s duplicate FileDemoLaunch enum + literal); (2) FileToolScript.run now streams via an emit closure instead of returning [String], so main prints each op output as produced and a mid-stream malformed line no longer swallows the already-emitted (and already-applied) prior outputs. Finding #3 (spawn helper stdin/stdout ordering) was informational â€” safe for the fixed tiny payloads, no change. Final verification (all fresh, green): swift build complete; swift run file-demo --script works; swift test --filter ScriptModeTests 4/4; full swift test 251 unit + 20 integration (incl. real sourcekit-lsp tier) pass, zero failures/warnings. Files: Sources/FileTool/FileToolScript.swift, Sources/FileTool/FileToolCLI.swift, Examples/FileDemo/Sources/file-demo/main.swift, Examples/FileDemo/Sources/file-demo/ChatValidationHarness.swift, Tests/FileToolIntegrationTests/ScriptModeTests.swift, Package.swift.'
